contract.name: dotpoap
contract.description: A Polkadot-native Proof-of-Attendance Protocol (POAP) smart contract

docs: Creates a new DotPOAP contract instance
constructors.label: new

docs: Creates a default DotPOAP contract instance (for testing)
constructors.label: default

docs: Events emitted by the contract
Event created
events.label: EventCreated

docs: Badge minted
events.label: BadgeMinted

docs: Badge transferred
events.label: BadgeTransferred

docs: Badge approved for transfer
events.label: BadgeApproval

docs: Operator approval for all badges
events.label: ApprovalForAll

docs: Returns the contract owner
messages.label: owner

docs: Returns the next event ID that will be assigned
messages.label: next_event_id

docs: Returns the next badge ID that will be assigned
messages.label: next_badge_id

docs: Creates a new event (only callable by any account - decentralized approach)
messages.label: create_event

docs: Updates event details (only by organizer)
messages.label: update_event

docs: Activates or deactivates an event for badge claiming (only by organizer)
messages.label: set_event_active

docs: Mints a badge for a specific user (only by event organizer)
messages.label: mint_badge_for_user

docs: Claims a badge for the caller (self-service claiming)
messages.label: claim_badge

docs: Transfers a badge to another account
messages.label: transfer_badge

docs: Transfers a badge from one account to another (requires approval)
messages.label: transfer_badge_from

docs: Approves another account to transfer a specific badge
messages.label: approve_badge

docs: Sets or unsets approval for all badges owned by the caller
messages.label: set_approval_for_all

docs: Gets event information by ID
messages.label: get_event

docs: Gets badge information by ID
messages.label: get_badge

docs: Gets all badge IDs owned by an account
messages.label: get_owned_badges

docs: Gets all badge IDs for a specific event
messages.label: get_event_badges

docs: Gets the number of badges owned by an account
messages.label: balance_of

docs: Gets the owner of a specific badge
messages.label: owner_of

docs: Gets the approved account for a specific badge
messages.label: get_approved

docs: Checks if an operator is approved for all badges of an owner
messages.label: is_approved_for_all

docs: Checks if a user has a badge for a specific event
messages.label: has_badge_for_event

docs: Gets the badge ID for a user's badge in a specific event (if any)
messages.label: get_user_badge_for_event
